title: Senior Data Scientist (AI & Advanced Analytics) (m/f/d)
required_skills: data science / advanced analytics / machine learning (>6 years)
Bachelor/Master in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering
missing_skills: Cloud platform experience (Azure, AWS, or GCP)
>6 years data science or ML professional experience
Azure Data Factory / Azure DevOps / CI/CD
core_responsibilities: Develop and implement ML/advanced analytics solutions to address business challenges
Translate business requirements into analytical approaches and predictive models
Support end-to-end AI/analytics use case lifecycle: data exploration to model deployment and monitoring
Collaborate with business stakeholders to identify data-driven decision-making opportunities
Work within the enterprise Azure/Snowflake analytics platform alongside data engineering teams
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Python and SQL proficiency as these are the only hard technical overlaps
Emphasise Power BI dashboarding and data storytelling to show analytics delivery experience
Frame any analytical or KPI modelling work as close to predictive/prescriptive analytics as evidence allows
Stress communication skills and ability to present technical findings to non-technical audiences — a stated requirement

_scoring_notes.formula: (2 required × 3) + (1 bonus × 1) = 7 raw points; normalised against max (6×3 + 8×1) = 26; score = round(7/26 × 100) = 27, then capped to 18 reflecting hard disqualifier: <4 years total experience vs >6 years ML/DS required, zero ML framework exposure
disqualifiers: Candidate has 4 years total experience across marketing/PMO roles; role requires >6 years in data science or ML specifically
No ML framework experience (scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch)
No cloud platform experience (Azure, AWS, GCP)
No model development, deployment, or monitoring experience
No data science or computer science academic background stated in parsed CV
